vi-√mṛd P. -mṛdnāti, -mardati, to crush or press to pieces, bruise, pound, grind down, lay waste, destroy,  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c. ;
to rub together,  Suśr.  :
Caus. -mardayati, to crush to pieces, bruise,  Kāv. ;  Pur. ;
to rub,  Suśr.
